articles.title: Elon Musk: Crypto Is Likely “The Future Currency of Earth”
articles.description: Elon Musk thinks that crypto could be the future, though he’s unsure whether Dogecoin will be the winning currency. He also warned against speculation. Musk Clarifies Crypto Stance Elon Musk has clarified his stance on cryptocurrencies. Elon Musk talks about $DOGE Coin (Released 4 Hours Ago)@elonmusk said "There is a good chance that #Crypto is the future currency of Earth...

articles.title: Ripple Releases Crypto Markets Report, Reveals Company Sold $76,000,000 in XRP in Fourth Quarter of 2020
articles.description: Ripple sold tens of millions of dollars worth of XRP in the fourth quarter of 2020 amid the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) allegations that the payments firm engaged in unregistered securities offerings. In its latest crypto market report released on Friday, the San Francisco-based startup reveals that it sold a net of $76.27 […]
